uplink.description: full boat frame: BME280 air T/P/RH + dewpoint, 12.6V battery + batt temp, GNSS fix, two analog levels, bilge alarm + relay on
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input and normalizing to the vocabulary (renamed keys, dropped upstream-hardcoded device/altitude/hdop and the redundant position object). air.pressure kept within the 900-1100 hPa vocabulary bound.

uplink.description: low-battery boat frame: 9.85V triggers undervoltage warning, no bilge alarm, relay off
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input and normalizing to the vocabulary. Battery 9.85V is below the upstream 10V threshold; the codec emits a `warnings` array (declared here per the conformance contract: data vectors that emit warnings must declare them).
Synthetic error case: the fixed frame is 27 bytes; anything shorter cannot be decoded.
